programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: A botched gas station robbery results in murder and abduction.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A conference provokes old-line policemen to reassess their attitudes, particularly toward minority groups.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A 91-year-old apartment-house manager gets involved in a murder investigation.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Reed tries to pawn off his new litter of puppies to co-workers, strangers and even victims. The officers work a silent alarm, rescue a boy with his head stuck in a fence and track down a prowler.

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.desc: "Toony tries to cure Bill's fear of insects with the help of live tarantula."

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Beaver becomes convinced that he's ugly and unwanted after constantly being reminded how cute he used to be and from being yelled at by his parents for how messy he is currently.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Wally is rounding up some guys to go to an amusement park and he's one short from getting a discount so he settles on Beaver. However, Beaver begins having second thoughts when he hears stories about one of the roller coasters.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Haunted Husband
programme.desc: Hitchhiking because her purse was stolen, Claire Olger is picked up by Michael Greeley. Intoxicated, he loses control of the car and collides with an oncoming truck. Arriving at the scene of the accident, the police find Claire alone in the car and the truck driver dead.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Matlock accepts the pro bono case of Kevin Meredith, a young man accused of murdering his lover, who, as Matlock discovers, had a shocking secret. In order to capture the real killer, Matlock must end a long-time friendship.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Gillespie suspects that JoAnn's new cook is connected to the murder of a young prostitute. But Virgil suspects the culprit maybe a local pimp who has been intimidating the women.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: Olivia and Elizabeth take a car trip; Jim-Bob is forced to also go.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: When Harry Speener learns that the man who saved his life is a wanted fugitive, he kills the man for the reward, then finds out that the people of Dodge don't like those who kill for money.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Hoss decides to help Arnie, a man who has never learned to control his great strength. Things seem to be working out until Arnie falls for a saloon girl. Hoss realizes that he is facing an uphill battle to help Arnie lead the kind of life that he has always wanted.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Marshal Torrance is heading home from a cattle sale with Lucas and Mark when the old lawman mysteriously disappears. They trace him to a nearby Mexican ghost town.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After Alphonso's wife gives birth, the bandits holding Marshal Torrance relax their guard, enabling Lucas and Mark to rescue the old man.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: When the wagon horses start to die of a disease, Adams is forced to send two feuding men to buy new horses with his emergency money. Two horses return, but with only one man, leading Adams to wonder whether he made a mistake.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: During their Christmas Eve Patrol, Malloy and Reed contemplate using their patrol car to deliver a Christmas tree to the residents of a soon-to-be-closed retirement home. Meanwhile, an elderly man's bagpipe playing is considered a public nuisance, a couple of teenagers steal a delivery truck containing radioactive material, a nervous man is desperate to cover up the smell of perfume on his clothing and an armed robbery suspect becomes intent on committing suicide-by-cop.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: While paying a visit to the laundromat before going into work, Malloy encounters a man using the facilities to dry something much different from clothing. On patrol, he and Reed deal with a minister-in-training who uses a very unorthodox method to get his message across, try to reunite a Finnish-speaking child with her family, mediate a strange dispute between feuding neighbors and engage in a high-speed chase with a well known drug dealer.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: The 4077th is confronted by two crises: Colonel Potter's mare, Sophie, mysteriously disappears from her corral, and Hawkeye and B.J. find themselves with a young Korean boy on their hands, who is trying to avoid conscription into the Army.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: A lecture on the latest techniques by a young surgeon from Tokyo, and a later demonstration of his surgical skill, turns Winchester into a drunk and Potter into an invalid, whilst bringing home to Hawkeye and B.J. that they are out of touch with new medical practices.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.sub-title: Hot Lips Is Back In Town
programme.desc: Radar, who is smitten with the cute new nurse, Linda Nugent, relies on Hawkeye's expertise on how to cope with the situation. Hot Lips, meanwhile, celebrates her just-granted divorce by taking a step that arouses Colonel Potter's ire.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: The 4077th evacuation to a nearby cave to avoid US artillery fire on a Chinese target poses problems for Hawkeye, who has a claustrophobia problem of which Colonel Potter is not aware.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie is afraid that Andy's new girlfriend, Peggy, will take his place in his father's heart, and sets out to sabotage their relationship.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney and Floyd run out of gas while coming home from a fishing trip. While looking for a telephone they are captured by three female escaped convicts.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny is glued to the television set the Clampetts received for Christmas, especially because of one TV Western star, Quirt Manly. She really wants to meet him, and Drysdale arranges for it to happen. And Granny already has him set up for Elly May, because she knows he is probably the only who can tame the vine-swinging girl. However, when he arrives at the mansion, the Clampetts see he isn’t who they thought he was. Quirt Manly is actually a short actor with a high-pitched voice who doesn’t do any of his own stunts or riding.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Lisa cons Oliver into taking a 'fifth' honeymoon together, this time in Hawaii. When they check into the honeymoon suite, they are unaware that the hotel manager's daughter, has given her friends the suite for their honeymoon also. Since the suite has two bedrooms it's just a case of both couples avoiding each other while on their honeymoon(s), for a while anyway.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: The Italian officer who studied under Klink helps Hogan photograph an air base.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan's men plan to surprise him for his birthday by blowing up an ammunition dump.

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show
programme.sub-title: Guests Perry Como And Tim Conway
programme.desc: "Guests Perry Como and Tim Conway. Originally aired on 01/20/69."

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Ice-cold Hands
programme.desc: After winning tickets at a horse track lead to accusations of theft and eventually murder, Mason must defend a woman caught in the middle.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: When a business man plans to build a dam in Africa, a witch doctor puts a curse on him.

programme.title: The Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.desc: An elderly acquaintance plunges Chris Martin into a nightmare stuffed with blackmail, kidnapping and murder.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: A member of Mannix's old combat unit, brought up on charges and court-martialed, wants revenge on Mannix and the only other survivor.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: A rich lady, Cecilia Lasher, hires Cannon to locate the son her husband abandoned years before. She turns to Cannon after being blackmailed and terrorized.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: A newsman takes pictures of evidence showing that an industrialist is involved with the mob.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: The pregnant Betty Jo is ready to have her baby, but problems arise when Wendell, the conductor, won't wake up and Betty Jo has to drive the train herself.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Betty Jo and baby return from the hospital for a stay at the Shady Rest, where they are to be looked after by Dr. Granny Clampett, a kooky distant relative whose nearsightedness finds her mistaking Dog for the baby.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Happy Gizzard isn’t doing well, and Jethro wants to improve his business. He thinks he has an idea to make his restaurant a huge success. After seeing signs outside other restaurants, he believes his restaurant should have topless waitresses. But he thinks this means the waitresses don’t wear hats. Jethro tells Drysdale just as he is working on landing a $20 million dollar account, scaring the millionaire Vanderponts away.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny misses the seasons, especially the snowy winter. She wants to go home to the hills and see some snow. Jed decides to let Granny win and calls Drysdale to tell him that Granny wants to head back home to the hills. He learns that she wants the snow back. Drysdale comes up with a plan to keep the hillbillies in Beverly Hills, telling them that a big blizzard is going to strike Beverly Hills.

programme.title: Popeye and Pals
programme.sub-title: Alona On The Sarong Seas, Many Tanks, A Date To Skate
programme.desc: "Popeye and Bluto are on a battleship anchored off a tropic isle. The big-muscled gob is dreaming about Princess Alona who is really Olive Oyl in a sarong., Popeye is in the Navy and Bluto is in the Army, but Bluto is confined to camp limits., It's Olive's first visit to a skating rink, and Popeye accidentally crashes into the pillar to which she is clinging. Popeye manages to rescue Olive in an amusing climax."

programme.title: The Tom and Jerry Show
programme.sub-title: That's My Pup, One Mother's Family, Puppy Tale
programme.desc: "Tom is the lesson when Spike is teaching his son Tyke the facts about chasing cats., A hen takes her chicks for a walk and has a difficult time keeping them all out of harm’s way., Jerry rescues some puppies and Tom doesn't want the one that followed him home around."

programme.title: The Woody Woodpecker Show
programme.sub-title: Tepee For Two, Salmon Loafer, Roof Top Razzle Dazzle, Skin Folks, Sh-h-h-h-h-h, Freeloading Feline, Rock-a-bye Gator
programme.desc: "Woody's neighbors evict him from the entire city, so Woody moves to the top of an indigineous man's teepee. He doesn't appreciate Woody's noise either., Chilly steals fish from Smedley's salmon cannery., Charlie tries to set up his TV's broadcast connection himself., Woody goes to his Uncle Scrooge Woodpecker in search of a handout, but he finds a house guarded by 10 crocodiles., A jazz musician desperately tries to quiet his nosey neighbors before his volatile condition causes him to blow up., Champ gets mistaken for a waiter at a fancy party and fulfills his duties by keeping Doc, a free-loader, out., While all the other gators are hibernating, Gabby Gator tries to trap and eat Woody while his guard is down."

programme.title: Bugs Bunny and Friends
programme.sub-title: Hare Do, The Prize Pest, Gorilla My Dreams, Fox Pop, Sniffles Bells The Cat, Acrobatty Bunny
programme.desc: "Elmer Fudd hunts for Bugs with an army surplus wabbit detector but it doesn't seem to work when Bugs leads him off a cliff. , Porky won a radio quiz show contest, and his prize is Daffy popping out of a cake. , Bugs is adrift at sea in a barrel when he suddenly finds an island. , A fox is convinced by listening to the radio that he'll be soon skinned and worn as a fashionable clothing article. In a strange twist of fate he ends up trying to get into the Sterling Silver Fox Fur farm. , Sniffles and his mouse friends are chased into their hole by the house cat. , While Bugs Bunny sleeps a circus comes to town and leaves a Lion's cage on top his home. The lion investigates Bug's hole. Bothered by the lion's invasive curiosity, Bugs opts to "fix" the wise guy."

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Dr. Loveless' newest plan involves a powder that lets him miniaturize anyone who opposes him... and Jim West is his first target.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Kitty Angel finds herself not welcome on the wagon train because of her past. When Flint returns to the train toting a sick indian baby, she has everyone's prejudices to deal with as well as the baby's life-threatening illness.

programme.title: The Big Valley
programme.desc: After hearing how the town of Mineral Springs has been ruined by the “boss” of a neighboring town, the Barkleys open a freight business connecting Mineral Springs with Stockton and the rest of the valley.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Hillbilly girl Merry Florene comes to town to get some schooling to better herself. Meanwhile, her two cousins also arrive in Dodge and force her to rob Mr. Jonas' store.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: The son of Luke Grayson wants revenge when he discovers that Ben Cartwright killed his father, even though it was in self-defense. Despite this, Ben and Hoss are determined to help the young man find a new life for himself.

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: Monty Fox comes stumbling up to the night camp playing the concertina, saying he's found the promised land. He says he's found Quivera, Coronado's golden city. He says he'll share with those who help him against those who chased him out.

programme.title: Have Gun, Will Travel
programme.desc: Paladin goes after Benjamin Coey, who brutally murdered James Bryson and attacked Mrs. Bryson. Coey has already killed two members of the posse which is after him. Mrs. Bryson's two brothers, Joseph and William Gage, are also after him and don't intend to allow him to live long enough to stand trial.

programme.title: Wanted Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh protects a beautiful deaf and mute teenage girl from men who want her father's stolen money, which he hid before going in prison.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Townspeople brace for the worst when a new girl arrives—with symptoms of smallpox.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A gunslinger rides into North Fork for a meeting with Lucas.

programme.title: The Three Stooges
programme.sub-title: Flatfoot Stooges, A Ducking They Did Go, I Can Hardly Wait, Gypped In The Penthouse, Rusty Romeos, Who Done It
programme.desc: "Moe, Larry and Curly take care of the horses. , After recruiting the police chief, governor and mayor into what turns out to be a sham duck hunting club, the Stooges cleverly find a way to avoid jail. , The Stooges are private detectives looking for a missing millionaire. They wander around the millionaire's spooky mansion confronting various crooks and a dangerous dame. The Stooges vanquish the crooks (Shemp uses his "trusty shovel") and find the missing man. , The Stooges are defense workers who have trouble getting to sleep when Curly gets a toothache. Moe and Larry try various ways to remove the offending tooth, but nothing works so they take Curly to the dentist. While Moe gets in the chair to show Curly how easy it's going to be, the dentist enters and pulls Moe's tooth by mistake. Curly then wakes up and realizes its all been a dream and a punch to the mouth from Moe dislodges the tooth. , Larry and Shemp reminisce about their experiences with Jean, a diamond crazy gold digger each of them was gypped by. After telling their stories, they have a run in with Moe, who is now married to the same women. When Jean shows up, they deliver some stooge-style revenge. , The Stooges don't know it, but they are all engaged to the same girl, a gold-digger who plans to get an engagement ring from each of them and then abandon them. When all three show up at her house at the same time, a wild fight ensues, as each stooge accuses the others of making time with "his" girl. The gold-digger gets it in the end (literally) with tacks shot from a repeating rifle. [A remake of "Corny Casanovas".] "

programme.title: Svengoolie
programme.desc: "A master magician murders his greedy employer, who legally owns every trick he can invent, and finds himself having to kill again."

programme.title: Batman
programme.desc: The Joker kidnaps a surfing champion in hopes of transferring his ability into his own body.

programme.title: Star Trek
programme.desc: The Enterprise travels to a planet suffering from cultural contamination from an earlier expedition—the inhabitants mimic the culture of 1930's gangland Chicago.

programme.title: Kolchak: The Night Stalker
programme.desc: A politician on a meteoric rise murders his opposition through a pact with Satan which gives him the ability to turn into an invulnerable dog.

programme.title: Lost in Space
programme.sub-title: The Girl From The Green Dimension
programme.desc: Girl from the green dimension Athena, who is in love with Dr. Smith, arrives on the planet with the aim of bringing Smith back home with her. Though Smith will do just about anything to get off the planet, things get complicated when her suitor, Urso, shows up.

programme.title: Voyage to the Bottom of the Sea
programme.desc: The Seaview is rendered helpless by the power of a mysterious spacecraft.

programme.title: Land of the Giants
programme.desc: A down-and-put trumpet player is in trouble with crooks, and a sympathetic Dan offers him a way out by teaching him Earth-style jazz.

programme.title: The Time Tunnel
programme.desc: Tony and Doug set out to checkmate the crafty Machiavelli, who is making a game of the Civil War battle at Gettysburg.

programme.title: The Invaders
programme.desc: A hotel owner is taken over by invaders awaiting a guest.

programme.title: The Powers of Matthew Star
programme.desc: "When another student begins having violent visions, Matt has to stop them from coming true."

programme.title: Saved by the Bell
programme.desc: Zack agrees to go on a date with Mr. Belding's niece, Penny, but when Kelly invites him to her birthday party, he sends Screech instead.

programme.title: Saved by the Bell
programme.desc: When her dad loses his job, Kelly chooses to cancel prom with Zack in order to save money.

programme.title: Saved by the Bell
programme.desc: Zack falls for a new student, only to discover that she's actually the new school nurse! Meanwhile, Slater is afraid of getting his flu shots.

programme.title: Saved by the Bell
programme.desc: The return of Bayside's radio station is a smash...except for Slater's boring sports broadcast. When he finds out no one likes it, he quits.

programme.title: Saved by the Bell
programme.desc: Zack sets up a 900-number hotline in his latest moneymaking scheme, with Lisa offering advice to the students of Bayside. Things go awry, however, when Zack takes over and offers terrible advice.

programme.title: Saved by the Bell
programme.desc: Jealous of Slater's skills in Driver's Education, Zack sabotages his driving test.

programme.title: The Flintstones
programme.desc: Fred inherits a shack from his hillbilly relatives--along with their one-hundred-year-old feud.

programme.title: The Flintstones
programme.desc: Fred befriends what he thinks is a kitten, but which soon grows into a troublesome lion.

programme.title: The Flintstones
programme.desc: The Flintstones and Rubbles go camping, but their seclusion is ruined by Boy Scouts.

programme.title: The Jetsons
programme.desc: After Astro swallows Elroy's flying toy car, Mr. Cogswell gets him dognapped to figure out the secret, as he thinks Spacely will try to put him out of business.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Cindy comes home in tears after a bully, Buddy Hinton, begins picking on her because of her lisp. One afternoon, Peter encounters Buddy teasing Cindy and defends her, but gets a black eye in the process. Mike and Carol try to reason with Buddy's parents but get nowhere, and Peter goes into training so he can defend himself against Buddy.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Jan has been smitten with Clark Tyson and they've been studying together. However, when Marcia casually, steps in the family room, Clark is instantly smitten. Jan becomes insecure about her looks and seeks out ways to get rid of her freckles. However, later, not wanting people to feel sorry for her, Jan makes up an imaginary boyfriend, George Glass.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Beaver, Gilbert and Richard find a burro for sale in Mayfield and they each decide to go in $10 for it. After getting their parent's permission, Richard and Gilbert fight over who gets to keep the burro, which they name Pepe. However, once they get a load of just how destructive a burro can be, they dump the problem of room and board on Beaver.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Eddie pompously announces that he's dropping out of school to get a high paying job at a gas station. However, all is not as it seems when Wally and Lumpy get a glance at Eddie's new free spending life.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed gets an honorary doctorate when he donates money to a college, and the family thinks he is now a legit doctor. However, Granny isn’t pleased with hearing that Jed is now a real college doctor because she didn’t go to college. Granny does her best to get a degree herself, but doesn’t find much success.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: It is the day after Granny beat up the Boston Strong Girl, making her the new champ, and the Clampetts are celebrating Granny’s great victory. But not all is well. The woman who plays the Boston Strong Girl is in trouble for getting beat up. The woman who plays Rebecca of Donnybrook Farm, a former topless waitress, has learned the truth, getting an invitation from Granny to visit. Their manager, Gene Booth, sees this as an opportunity to get Granny to fight, after hearing the huge ratings the fight got.

programme.title: Gilligan's Island
programme.desc: A crate containing coconuts is wrapped in an old Honolulu newspaper that says one of the castaways is being sought in a murder investigation.

programme.title: Gilligan's Island
programme.desc: A storm washes up a trans-continental telephone cable into the lagoon. The Professor manages to break into the cable and rig up a telephone so they can dial out for help.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Ellen's news that she's been named "Woman of the Year" by the Raytown Country Club doesn't interest the family until they all receive invitations to the awards dinner. Once there, the Harpers end up disrupting the formal affair.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: When Naomi announces she may be pregnant, she and Vint, living in the basement, request a room upstairs. It's not long before the family is fighting over which room the couple will get.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.sub-title: Not So Fast, Gopher / Haven't We Met Before? / Foreign Exchange
programme.desc: "Gopher invites his widowed mother onto the ship in the hopes of cheering her up, but is hurt by her seemingly cheerful attitude, which he interprets as an insult to his father. A group of buddies takes a cruise. One of the men meets a woman who is a regular customer at the restaurant where he works. He lies about his identity because he thinks she would be put off by the fact that he is a waiter. A comic's romance with the reporter who is writing a feature about him appears doomed after she takes offense to his act."

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Aunt Bea longs for a special present: a blue bed jacket.

programme.title: Collector's Call
programme.desc: "Doc Mack is the owner and proprietor of Galloping Ghost, the world's largest video game arcade, a place so massive it generates 19 separate electric bills. Lisa gets a private tour of the gallery's many vintage treasures and rarities, learning the meaning, and value, of “shmup” (shoot-’em-up) games like Turkey Shooter and Blaster. She also checks out the ultra-rare Primal Rage 2, which never made it to market, and gets a privileged look at the Sega R 360, an actual flight-simulator module where the player is spun, flipped, and rolled while engaging in game-play, Doc’s being the only one available to the public anywhere in the world. Doc’s friend and colleague, Zespy, a video game aficionado and owner of his own arcade, is on hand to set a price on Doc's unparalleled collection, then to try to tempt him into a trade. Will he hit on something Doc actually doesn't yet have? And what will he ask for in return? "

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: The sinister Colonel Flagg pops up at the 4077th again, playing his usual spy games, convinced that Hawkeye is a communist sympathizer after he saves the life of a North Korean soldier. Also, an American soldier is less than impressed.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: On a sub-note, Klinger plays the part of a voodoo practitioner to try and get out of the Army.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie's steals a box of nails from work and finds himself at the center of a household debate on morality.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie feels the weight of his own mortality after a magazine quiz on life expectancy gives him another seven years - tops.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Edith is reunited with her childhood sweetheart when she returns to her hometown for a wedding

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: The Bunker house is locked in a battle of wills after Mike vows he can go without food longer than Archie can abstain from smoking.

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show
programme.sub-title: Guests Don Rickles And Mel Torme
programme.desc: "Guests Don Rickles and Mel Torme. Originally aired on 12/07/70."

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show
programme.sub-title: Guests Chita Rivera And Vice Edwards
programme.desc: "Guests Chita Rivera and Vice Edwards. Originally aired on 02/03/69."

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Rob and Laura try to get rid of their painter who eccentric behavior causes problems.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Rob, Laura and the office gang put together a variety show to help an old friend.

programme.title: The Honeymooners
programme.desc: Ralph and Norton go on T.V. to sell a kitchen utensil.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A janitor living in the year 1890 accidentally activates a time traveling helmet, which transports him to 1962—and then promptly breaks down.

programme.title: The Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.desc: A man wakes up with a hangover, an unknown woman in his room and his wife lost.

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Kimble is working as the "general factotum" in a swank Beverly Hills hotel on Sunset Blvd. An undercover policeman, named Fred Bragin, checks into the hotel to survey Eddie Slade, a notorious mob bookie. When Slade leaves town for a few days to sort out s

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: With the key witness in the trial against mob boss Constantine Victor murdered, the IMF has just 24 hours to convince Victor's close friend to testify against him in court.

programme.title: Peter Gunn
programme.desc: An attempt on Lt. Jacoby's life is made after he receives a mysterious phone call.

programme.title: Peter Gunn
programme.desc: Wealthy invalid Louise Reardon has an attempt made on her life and Gunn is hired to find her Aide, Scully.

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: A woman attempts to help her innocent fiancé and discovers a killer may still be at large.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: The detectives go to work on several cases connected with the department's business-office division.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A pot-detecting pooch joins the police to stop marijuana smuggling.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: A ditzy young woman reports her 1958 Ford convertible stolen while she went into a liquor store. She left the keys in the car, has no paperwork, doesn't know the license number or other details but she needs it by 6 PM for a date. She finally tells the officers that her eight-foot boa constrictor is in the trunk as she was coming from the vet.

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.desc: "It's picture day! Bill and Toony pose for their retro-styled portrait, as Bill reminisces about the good ol' days of taking a real photograph."

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: A communication gap ensues when Wally wants to spend the night at Lumpy's and Beaver wants to have Gilbert spend the night. Beaver asks June and she tells him he can sometime when Wally spends the night somewhere and Wally asks Ward, who tells him he can sometime when Beaver has someone spend the night.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Beaver agrees to help Richard cart his family's clothes down to the laundromat; however, half way there they discover that Richard has lost the three dollars his mother gave him. This leads him to ask Beaver if he could use the Cleaver washer. They soon find themselves in another jam when the washing machine overflows after Beaver put in too much soap and starch.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Lonely Heiress
programme.desc: Heiress Marilyn Cartright places an ad in a magazine in order to find love and companionship. In reality, Marilyn is looking for the con artist who swindled and drove her sister to suicide.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Matlock represents a maid accused of killing her employer at the request of the man's widow. The request is a little odd, but it seems the widow wants everyone to know exactly what kind of man her husband was.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: A minister who was integrating his church(by inviting Virgil and Althea to attend services)is poisoned.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: Jim-Bob wonders if he is adopted because he does not look like other family members

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: After a renegade band of ex-soldiers seriously injure Tahrohon, his friend, buffalo man Noah Meek, vows revenge on the group.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Hoss finds himself falling in love with widow Helen Layton and intends to marry her, unaware of her true nature.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lou looks for a way out when the man her dying father promised her to arrives.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An assassination plot unfolds as four gunmen disguised as cavalrymen enter North Fork. Their target: Sen. Jim Borden. Their weapon: a Gatling gun.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Flint, in love with a Mormon girl he can't marry, joins the Confederate Army. When he finds out that he won't be seeing any action on the battlefield, it may be too late for him and the girl he loves.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy and Reed investigate a large car theft operation that targets older cars, then stages them around the city as abandoned vehicles so they can be towed and scrapped. Meanwhile, they try to figure out why the son of Malloy's girlfriend is getting bad grades, search for a suspect who robbed an elderly woman and attempt to rescue two foolish teenagers who enter a house that is being fumigated.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy and Reed are left frustrated after investigating the theft of an elderly woman's old television set, but they have hope that a recently passed law may provide her and other victims with compensation. Elsewhere on patrol, they search for an armed robber who shot an over-trusting shopkeeper, and respond to a call of an unusual armed robbery at a drive-in.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: A typical day in the life of Rosie's bar, complete with AWOL problem drinkers, a bound and gagged Winchester and a gambling scheme.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: The impossible happens for the snobbish Charles when he shares an emotional experience with Klinger, who discovers a US nurse, Debbie, finds him and his bizarre attire attractive, while Charles succumbs to the exotic charms of a Korean girl, called Sooni, who he meets at Rosie's Bar.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Talk of a post-war reunion gives B.J. an idea—planning a present-day stateside gathering of 4077th families. He continues to obsess with the idea even under the duress of bug-out instigated by a Chinese breakthrough. Also, Klinger fears that the party will blow his cover, as his mother doesn't know he's stationed in Korea.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: A clumsy foot soldier, "Look Out Below" Conway, finds the quickest way to the crew's heart, boosting morale at the 4077th by cooking gourmet delights. Only Colonel Potter, burdened with a personal crisis, is immune from the high spirits enveloping the hospital.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney tries to convince everyone of a lack of security at Mayberry Bank, and is furious that no one listens to him. Taking matters into his own hands, he ends up stuck in the bank vault.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie must learn to defend himself against a bully.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny announces to the family that she is planning to retire from her doctor’s practice and tells Elly and Jethro she expects one of them to take over. Jed tells this to Jane and Drysdale, also mentioning how she wants her money to take back to the hills. Drysdale plans to get Granny to stay, so he gets Dr. Clyburn to go to the mansion. After Granny reveals why she is really going back to the Hills, to cure what she calls "Granny’s complaint," Clyburn visits the mansion for medical advice.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver contacts Carol, his one-time secretary, to find out where she'd had his watch repaired years earlier. In this pilot for a proposed series, Carol now works for a California realtor. She prevents her current boss from being conned by man that Oliver Douglas had tried to indict back in New York.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: The Gestapo gets a female to pry information out of Schultz.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan steals a Luftwaffe codebook, but must organize a special mission when Newkirk drops it down a well.

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show
programme.sub-title: Guests Shirley Jones And Ken Berry
programme.desc: "Guests Shirley Jones and Ken Berry. Originally aired on 02/17/69."

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Bountiful Beauty
programme.desc: After Stephanie Carew's body is found floating in a swimming pool, the coroner’s report finds that she died in the ocean and her corpse was then placed in the pool. Meanwhile, the police have learned unsettling information about best-selling novelist Deborah Dearborn, and it ties her to the murder.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.sub-title: Five Characters In Search Of An Exit
programme.desc: A hobo, clown, bagpipe player, ballerina and military officer are trapped in a huge cylinder.

programme.title: The Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.desc: Preacher Robert Evans will go to murderous lengths to obtain a woman's manor for his gospel sanctuary.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Roger Bard brings Mannix to Mexico. Bard claims men are hunting him—and they are. But he also claims not to know why—and that is certainly a lie.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: "A serial murder targets Cannon as his next victim. At first the homicide wanted to be finally released from his compulsion to kill. Cannon accepted to help him. But Cannon got too involved in the killer's demands."

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: A mother asks Barnaby to help her find her runaway daughter, who's married to a contract killer.

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: A poor prospector arouses suspicion when he suddenly begins paying off long-standing debts.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday's problem: is his temporary partner an aide—or an adversary?

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A 15-year-old car thief is given a tour of the jail in an attempt to show him the consequences for choosing crime.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Walters and Brinkman are on a roll lately and like to brag, much to the irritation of Reed. He and Malloy help them out by finishing one of their calls, then rescue a sick teenage girl and arrest the young man who took her in. Back on patrol, they meet an informant who gives them a tip on a big drug buy scheduled for 11 PM. They give the info to Sgt. Miller who asks them to help in the bust.

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.desc: "From animals to music, Bill and Toony disucss famous occurences on August 13th."

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Ward allows his car to be driven by Lumpy, who must get Eddie, Wally and Beaver to a sporting event in a neighboring town. However, on the way back, Lumpy disobeys Ward's orders and takes a shortcut home.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: "When Wally has a previous engagement and is unable to babysit, Beaver fills in and quickly finds himself the object of a 10-year old's affection."

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Green-eyed Sister
programme.desc: Arthur West, a disreputable private investigator, has found J. J. Stanley in a cheap motel. He knows Stanley and his partner, Ned Bain, were involved in the embezzlement of the Texas National Bank. He wants to blackmail Bain into giving him money to keep quiet.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: "Matlock is hired to defend Brad Bingham, an aging football star with a reputation as a womanizer who was about to be cut from the team. Charlene is resistant to her father's choice, as she believes everything the tabloids have to say about Brad...not only that, but years earlier, he'd had a brief relationship with her friend Ellen Hawley, who had tried to kill herself after they broke up."

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: In this thought provoking episode. Gillespie is surprised when a man he arrested asks to see him on the eve of his execution. He must confront his feelings about the death penalty when the prisoner asks him to witness his death.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: Ben starts to hunt animals for their skins to sell for profit.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: After a group of outlaws assassinates a Texas border town sheriff at his retirement party, Matt Dillon chases the desperadoes to Mexico.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: After Joe shoots and kills a man starting a fire on the Ponderosa in self-defense, the Cartwrights have their hands full protecting Joe from the dead man's vengeful clan.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Sharpshooter Marty Blair tries to persuade Lucas to buy Mark a rifle.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Fast-draw artist Wade Randall is less than anxious to display his prowess.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Hunter Malloy and his partner get jobs as drivers on the wagon train as part of their plan to rob the boss. Striking gold instead while stopping to repair their wagons, the fever is high as some stop to strike it rich and uncover more than just a few nuggets.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Officer Woods' new partner is a nervous and quiet recruit, and the embarrassing secret he's trying to keep from his fellow officers might actually imperil them. On today's patrol, a real estate broker's well meaning but poorly thought out gesture nearly leads to a mob scene, a drug store owner discovers a way to profit from armed robbers and an armed robbery suspect opens fire during his escape attempt.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: On today's patrol, Malloy and Reed try to corral cattle that are wandering into the downtown area, pull over a speeding bicyclist, chase down a man with a stolen guitar and break up a bar fight. After their shift is over, Reed and his wife witness a gas station holdup on their way to dinner with Malloy and his girlfriend.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: A Congressional aide, Williamson, visits the 4077th on a supposedly routine fact-finding tour, but it's discovered that his motives are far deeper—too uncover Margaret as a communist sympathizer. His case is full of innuendo, so the gang set out to help Margaret.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: The arrival of a wounded Korean woman sparks a conflict at the 4077th: Hawkeye wants to heal her, but a steely ROK officer, Lt. Park, is more anxious to "question" her about alleged guerilla activities.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: On leave in Tokyo, Radar is desperately needed back at the crisis-stricken 4077th, but his return is delayed by outside events. While casualties continue to pour in from the front, the 4077th's generator conks out, and the backup has been stolen.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: As company clerk Radar O'Reilly reluctantly prepares to depart the 4077th, the unit is still without electricity due to a broken generator, and the operating room continues to fill up with war wounded as night falls.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney is goaded into ticketing the governor's car and mistakenly believes Andy is setting him up for a dressing-down by the governor.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Big businessman Malcolm Tucker is stuck in Mayberry on a Sunday when his car breaks down outside the city limits. He's soon driven to frustration when he finds there is no way to get anything done until the following day.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny is getting tired of the clan’s sixty-eight million dollars. When three struggling college girls visit the Clampetts asking for a donation to help them out, Jed hands over a check for their entire fortune. The Clampetts are flat broke, and they have never been happier, though Drysdale is now in a wreck. They pack up to head back to the hills, but end up running out of gas.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: New York lawyer Oliver Douglas quits his job at the law firm of Felton, O'Connell, Clay, Blakely, Harmon, Dillion & Pasteur and buys a farm in Hooterville, sight unseen. The locals are astounded that Haney had managed to unload the place on someone and try to talk him out of it. Laying her eyes on the dilapidated farmhouse for the first time, Lisa bursts into tears.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan and his men volunteer for a German suicide squad train bound for the Russian front in order to steal key documents.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan and his men plan to destroy a gasoline station that has just been built in camp.

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show
programme.sub-title: Guests Barbara Mcnair And Soupy Sales
programme.desc: "Guests Barbara McNair and Soupy Sales. Originally aired on 02/24/69."

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Nervous Neighbor
programme.desc: Private investigator Paul Drake is sent to locate Charles Fuller's missing mother. Not only is she missing, she is suspected in a murder that happened the day before she went missing. When Drake locates the missing women, he learns that she was found badly beaten in a field six months earlier and has lost her memory.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A soldier gets a new perspective on war when he is forced to experience it from his enemy's point of view.

programme.title: The Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.desc: Two business executives throw themselves into a battle of wits and trickery as they compete for a gorgeous lady.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Mannix tries to find missing building contractor Donald Jordan. He gets poor help from the man's partner, wife and sister. Each offers a different reason for his disappearance. When Jordan reappears, he assures Mannix that he's fine and asks him to drop the case.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.sub-title: He Who Digs A Grave: Part 2
programme.desc: A lady journalist is forced to reveal her sources in a murder news or she will go to jail on a contempt charge. She enlist Cannon's service to unravel the murder of a missing excursionist.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: After a marital spat, a wife leaves her spouse to meet a football player in an ultimately fatal rendezvous.

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: Dan Mathews and Sergeant Corey spend Christmas Eve searching for a lost girl.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon investigate the delay of death notifications in the state employment department.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: The battered-child syndrome: Friday and Gannon investigate a youngster with severe back lacerations.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.sub-title: Log 122 Christmas: The Yellow Dump Truck
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve, Reed and Malloy make rounds distributing police department donation packages to needy families, and pull many heartstrings.

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.desc: "Bill & Toony try out some extreme summer sports. "

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Beaver decides to join the basketball team but finds himself trying to live up to Wally's performance. However, after not making the team, Beaver allows his family to believe that he did.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Seeing an ad for typewriters on sale, Beaver talks his parents into letting him get one as long as he learns how to use it. However, Beaver discovers learning to type is not as easy as it looks and soon finds himself making a deal with the shady Eddie Haskell.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Fugitive Nurse
programme.desc: Janet Norris is charged with poisoning her doctor husband just before he flew to his death in his private plane. Further investigation reveals that Dr. Norris did not die in the plane crash and that he is in Mexico with his nurse mistress.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Matlock represents Nicholas Baron, a well-known mobster who has been accused of murdering a rival.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: The past comes back to haunt JoAnn in the form of an escaped convict.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: John-Boy smokes a pipe and Grandpa leaves a heater plugged in and turned on and a fire breaks out

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Matt has to intervene when an honest but strict indian agent charges an innocent indian of murder.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: A woman shows up to the Ponderosa claiming to have just married Ben. The problem is, Ben has never seen her before in his life!

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A speculator will stop at nothing to grab Lucas's land.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark blames himself for a friend's accidental death.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: The sheriff of Bitter Springs feels he has lots of reasons to hate. When settlers from the South want to live there, he accuses them of enslaving a black child, but his reasons for keeping them from the town go much deeper than that.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Officer Wells appears to have met his match with a new partner who always insists on doing things his own way. Today's shift features a hot-headed husband who's decided he needs a gun to protect his home, and a neglected girl who causes a scare while playing.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Reed thinks he's got a great deal lined up on a used boat, but Malloy's convinced there's something fishy going on. While on patrol, they search for a man who sold a stolen horse to a riding academy, use an informant's tip to investigate a suspicious restaurant parking lot attendant and face an accusation of stealing a socialite's diamond ring during a burglary investigation.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Klinger and B.J. both have Radar-related woes, causing them to go on a drinking binge. A drunken B.J. becomes violent with Hawkeye.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: A beautiful and ambitious young nurse, Harris, who plans to become a doctor when she leaves the Army, finds herself in a misunderstanding with Father Mulcahy. Meanwhile, the camp's water supply is depleted, and the rest of the 4077th is more concerned about where their next shower will come from.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: A South Korean woman misinterprets Klinger's motives when he tries to help her daughter financially. Meanwhile, Hawkeye wrestles with his conscience over a promise made to a dying soldier, Eddie Hastings.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Charles returns to the 4077th after a trip to Tokyo with an uncharacteristic hangover and the uneasy feeling of a romantic entanglement. Meanwhile, the hospital struggles to find a cure for an outbreak of deadly hemorrhagic fever.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney gets hysterical when Andy receives a letter from a man he arrested and sent to prison. The convict is to be released soon and says in the letter that he is coming to settle the score with Andy.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: An escaped goat eats a case of dynamite that was going to be used for blasting and puts Mayberry in danger—especially when Otis Campbell gets drunk.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: When she hears Native Americans are visiting Beverly Hills, Granny is worried about an Indian attack on their land. Drysdale, on the other hand, is worried about losing the Clampett land. However, the two Native Americans who visit, Chief Running Wolf and his son, Little Fox, come to talk and visit with Jed and Jethro.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.sub-title: Lisa's First Day On The Farm
programme.desc: Lisa gets her first look at their dilapidated-and empty--farmhouse and is horrified. Oily Mr. Haney, who previously owned the dump, took everything with him, including the bathroom fixtures, and tries to resell them to Oliver. Eb, one of Haney's workers, is hired on as their farm hand. Lisa goes out to meet the locals, most of whom have entered a pool wagering on how long the Douglases will stay. Lisa is ready to immediately return to New York, but after a chat with Kate Bradley, she decides to give farm life a try.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan kidnaps Burkhalter's sister in order to exchange her for a captured Allied agent.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Klink is to be executed when the Gestapo finds him with information Hogan planted on him to deliver to the underground.

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show
programme.sub-title: Guests Martha Raye And Mike Douglas
programme.desc: "Guests Martha Raye and Mike Douglas. Originally aired on 03/17/69."

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Fifty-millionth Frenchman
programme.desc: Frenchman Phillipe falls for a married woman, taking her away from a violently abusive husband. When the ex-husband dies piloting his airplane, Phillipe is blamed for drugging him.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A lonely old woman refuses to leave her apartment for fear of meeting "Mr. Death."

programme.title: The Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.desc: The passing away of Andrew Anderson's spouse sets off strange events calculated to drive the widower insane.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Mannix suspects Floyd Brown of stealing 45 cases of morphine. That's bad news for Peggy because Floyd is her boyfriend. This case almost costs Joe his secretary, and Peggy her life.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: Frank travels to a small ranching town to help out a writer friend charged with a double murder. Frank's only clue is a cryptic note left by the man's wife.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: A woman murders her father-in-law when he refuses to give her any money.

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: Several law-abiding citizens unknowingly help a charming murderer escape.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A costumed thief calling himself "The Crimson Crusader" has been stealing comic books, movie posters and publicity photos of various superheroes.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Posing as orange growers, Friday and Gannon attempt to bust a gambling operation.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: After roll call, Reed and Malloy provide backup at a robbery, help a lost man return home, handle a call about a prowler and respond to a silent alarm. Malloy demonstrates for Reed the importance of "officer presence."

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Ward comes down hard on Wally after he comes home two hours late, this fuels June and Ward's suspicions that Wally is contemplating joining the Merchant Marines. June had discovered some pamphlets hidden in his dresser drawer. However, little does anyone know, Wally has been getting the information for Lumpy who's seriously thinking of joining.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Beaver gets a new girl in his class and is instantly smitten. He begins walking her home from school but he soon realizes that the girl has an agenda on her mind. Her sole purpose is to get close to Beaver in order to get close to Wally. This leads Beaver to accuse Wally of stealing his girl.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The One-eyed Witness
programme.desc: Della and Mason's dinner at a fancy French restaurant is interrupted by a phone call and an envelope containing $500 from a mysterious woman named Marian Fargo. She wants him to make an exchange: the money for some documents.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Even though they've lost a key witness, Matlock keeps defending mobster Nicholas Baron against the charge that he murdered a rival.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: A teenage mother from an impoverished family is arrested for murder after her infant is found dead, but Virgil believes there is more to the case than meets the eye. Meanwhile Althea believes the situation could have been prevented if the school had offered sex education classes.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: John-Boy smokes a pipe and Grandpa leaves a heater plugged in and turned on and a fire breaks out

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Durning a drought, a watch witch (someone who can find water), comes to town. Meanwhile, a businessman attempts to buy up farms during this time, no matter the method.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Joe and Hoss get in some trouble when they "rob" the bank.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Nils Swenson, North Fork's blacksmith, volunteers to take the marshal's place for a few days while Micah attends a wedding in another town. To help maintain peace, Nils institutes a policy that anyone coming into town must turn in their weapons, getting them back when they leave. This plan backfires on Nils when some dishonest men come to town.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas's self-confidence begins to slip away when he misses an easy shot.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Ella Lindstrom loses her husband on the wagon train ride west from Boston. With her seven children she decides to stay the course against the wishes of Major Adams. It gets more complicated when she thinks she is expecting number eight.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy and Reed are on the lookout for a traveling business man driving a green pinto, who called his wife in Nebraska and told her he was going to commit suicide at 2 PM. Meanwhile, they search for a woman who abandoned her newborn baby in a garbage can, and get a tip from an elderly woman about a group of car strippers.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: On his way to an auto mechanic, Malloy is ambushed and kidnapped by a group of drug runners who plan to use him to secure the release of one of their associates.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Hawkeye and B.J. lose their way while rushing urgently needed antibiotics to the 4077th, which is wracked with low-mileage Thanksgiving turkey-induced salmonella. Wandering back to M*A*S*H, the pair are found by a peculiar North Korean soldier.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Hawkeye and B.J. race against the clock to save a soldier from paralysis. B.J.'s harvesting an aorta from a dead soldier doesn't sit well with the soldier's friend.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Klinger discovers that his duties as company clerk include catering to the eccentric whims of the 4077th officers. Consequently, the unusual demands by Klinger's superiors leave little time to write a letter home to Toledo.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: A brawl at Rosie's Bar puts Rosie in the hospital, and the 4077th doctors are pressed into service as temporary saloon-keepers. Meanwhile, Father Mulcahy is apprehensive that his long-pending promotion to captain will again be denied.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy meets up with his high school sweetheart at their reunion and it appears they could be rekindling their relationship. But do they want the same things, and did they ever?

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Rafe Hollister, a simple farmer with an incredible voice, is encouraged by Andy to enter the Mayberry singing contest, much to the dismay of the mayor and other officials.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: At the mansion, the clan is in need of food because the hunting in Beverly Hills is horrible. They call a catering company, but get mean-mouthed. At the bank, Drysdale gets a call and learns that he got a kangaroo from a friend and it is at his house.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver wants to start farming but Lisa demands he have their house redecorated first. Sam Drucker recommends a decorator from Pixley. Kate Bradley tries to tutor Lisa in the kitchen since she doesn't know the first thing about cooking. Kate starts by showing her how to make something easy: hotcakes. Adding to the chaos is Oliver's mother, who arrives to rescue Lisa from her nightmarish country life.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan plans to get the blueprints for and interfere with the testing of a new weapon.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan plans to steal the picture that the Gestapo is using to blackmailing Klink.

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show
programme.sub-title: Guests Larry Hovis And Barrie Chase
programme.desc: "Guests Larry Hovis and Barrie Chase. Originally aired on 03/24/69."

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Frightened Fisherman
programme.desc: When the former boss and wife of a scientist attempt to prevent him from taking the credit for a new antibiotic, the wife turns up dead and her scientist husband has trouble clearing his name.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An eccentric millionaire invites three people to visit him in his bomb shelter.

programme.title: The Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.desc: When a distressed housekeeper murders her boss, the deceased man's wife is charged with the crime.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Newspaper publisher John Randolph asks Mannix to learn why his daughter is acting so strangely. Mannix discovers she may have killed a mobster.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: Frank struggles to prove his friend did not commit murder, but someone (the real killer) is working equally hard to thwart him.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: An escaped convict asks Barnaby to help him prove he didn't kill a judge.

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: Highway Patrol races to the rescue when a kidnapped victim is injured in the mountains.
